message.content: We keep hitting a flaky deploy. The staging database is reset every night at 2am UTC, which wipes the test fixtures we rely on.

content.text: Understood. We decided to seed fixtures in a Vitest setup hook instead of relying on staging data, because the 2am staging reset is non-negotiable and out of our control.

message.content: This harness-injected meta turn must be skipped by the ingester and never indexed.

content.text: Also recorded a durable preference: use Vitest over Jest in this repo for first-class ESM compatibility, and keep embeddings local by default to stay offline.
